title: Schema Model Incremental Strategy (Deprecated Top-Level Field)
description: DEPRECATED: use `materialization.strategy` instead. Replace top-level `"incremental_strategy": { "type": "delete+insert" }` with `"materialization": { "type": "incremental", "strategy": { "type": "delete+insert" } }`. Wraps the shared strategy shape (`model.incremental_strategy.schema.json`) so the deprecation hint applies only when the field is authored at the model top level, not when it's nested under `materialization.strategy` (the canonical, non-deprecated location).
